case_title: RICHARD ORTIZ VS. ANTHONY CARRION et al

docket_entries.description: ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE RE PROOF OF SERVICE ON AUG-02-2011 IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
DECLARATION OF COUNSEL IN RESPONSE TO OSC RE: POS FILED BY PLAINTIFF ORTIZ, RICHARD

LAW AND MOTION 302, THE LAW FIRM OF SEIFER, MURKEN, DESPINA, JAMES & TECHMAN'S MOTION TO BE RELIEVED AS COUNSEL FOR PLAINTIFF RICHARD ORTIZ IS GRANTED. NO OPPOSITION FILED AND GOOD CAUSE SHOWN. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: HAROLD KAHN; NOT REPORTED.
